markdown.markdown:
::: columns ::: {.column width="4%"} {{< fa chart-line size=normalsize >}}
{{< fa code-branch size=normalsize >}}
{{< fa hard-drive size=small >}}
{{< fa person-circle-plus size=normalsize >}}
{{< fa brain size=normalsize >}} ::: ::: {.column width="96%"} ***Data Science:*** \ Statistical programming; Interactive dashboard design;
***Data Engineering:*** \ End-to-end ETL data pipeline design & automation; Dataset transformations;
***Data Management:*** \ Data centralization and governance; High-performance computing clusters;
***Clinical Trials:*** \ Drug and behavioral interventions.
***Neuroimaging:*** \ Magnetic Resonance Imaging analysis of the human brain. ::: ::: ### Programming & Tools ::: columns ::: {.column width="46%"} \ \ R \ (tidyverse, targets, Shiny) \ \
\ \ Python (pandas, nibabel, scikit-learn)
![](images/matlab_icon2){.absolute .matlab-icon width="14"} \ \ MATLAB ::: ::: {.column width="36%"} \ \ Shell Scripting (Bash, zsh)
\ \ Git
\ Docker
::: ::: {.column width="12%"} - **XNAT** - **FlyWheel** - **FSL** ::: ::: ### Experience ::: columns ::: {.column width="9%"} ![](images/keck_med_seal.png){.absolute width="45"} ::: ::: {.column width="91%"} `Jun 2025 - Present`{style="float: right; 12px; margin-bottom: -10px;"} **University of Southern California, Los Angeles CA**
Data Engineer (Resource Employee), *Laboratory of NeuroImaging* - Built and maintained a secure Linux-based research server to support multi-site neuroimaging data governance, querying, and analysis workflows. - Deployed and managed imaging informatics platform (XNAT) to centralize MRI data and establish infrastructure for multi-site neuroimaging research projects. - Collaborated with Principal Investigator to adapt infrastructure and data workflows to changing analytical and experimental requirements. ::: ::: ::: columns ::: {.column width="9%"} ![](images/chla_logo.png){.absolute width="45"} ::: ::: {.column width="91%"} **Children's Hospital Los Angeles, Los Angeles CA** `Jun 2025 - May 2026`{style="float: right; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: -10px;"}
Research Assistant, *Computational Imaging of Brain Organization Research Group* - Developed automated, containerized neuroimaging preprocessing pipelines (Docker-based), improving reproducibility and efficiency of analytical workflows. - Generated analysis-ready brain MRI datasets to support interpretation of neuroimaging signals and downstream machine learning and statistical analyses. - Implemented data quality control and validation procedures to ensure reliability of cleaned datasets and downstream analysis and reporting. ::: ::: ::: columns ::: {.column width="9%"} ![](images/mgh_logo.png){.absolute width="45"} ::: ::: {.column width="91%"} `Oct 2022 - Jul 2024`{style="float: right; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: -10px;"} **Massachusetts General Hospital, Boston MA**
Programmer, *Center for Addiction Medicine*
- Designed and maintained end-to-end ETL data pipelines (with Git) to ingest and process incoming clinical trial data, generating clean datasets and statistical results. - Developed dashboards to monitor data ingestion, identify missing or inconsistent data, and improve visualization of summary statistics to support ongoing data reviews. - Led recurring data review sessions, identifying data trends, inconsistencies, or risks, and opportunities to improve data quality and workflow efficiency. - Collaborated with biostatisticians and investigators to support statistical analysis and interpretation of complex behavioral and biomedical data. - Managed EDC research databases (REDCap) and automated data extraction via API integration with a strong oversight on data quality. - Compiled and harmonized longitudinal datasets and metadata to enable cross-cohort analysis. - Trained programmers on code reproducibility, software engineering, and privacy regulations in research. ::: ::: ::: columns ::: {.column width="9%"} ![](images/barilan_logo.png){.absolute width="45"} ::: ::: {.column width="91%"} **Bar-Ilan University, Tel-Aviv - Israel** `Aug 2020 - Dec 2020`{style="float: right;"}
Research Intern, *Developmental Neuropsychology Lab*
- Data processing, cleaning, and analysis for eye-tracking data to measure EEG and gaze coordination patterns using repeated measures ANOVA. ::: :::
